page_metadata.biotools__summary:
An online resource for exploration of tRNA-derived fragments in human cancers.

a comprehensive database for tRNA-derived RNA fragments in human cancer research.

OncotRF provides an integrated view of dysregulated tRFs among cancers. It serves as a starting point for users to study tRF gene regulation and its functional role in cancers.
